summary: The finalize-branches feature correctly completed all branch structure goals: clean-rebuild was force-pushed to master, abandoned-master is on origin, master contains all 8 milestone feature PRs in clean squash-merge history, and no deferred feature code is present.

observations.finding: Master contains all milestones in order: baseline-green, trade-path (datatypes + integration), cachebox, exotic-tokens (impl + address fixes), erc4626, curve-gauges, convex, misc-fixes. Each is a clean squash merge PR commit.
abandoned-master exists as both a local branch and remotes/origin/abandoned-master. Confirmed preserved on origin.
No pool_index code found. Deferred features are not present on master.
No quote_token or get_price_in code found. Multi-hop routing and quote-token support are not present.
Verified the file exists and documents the deferred features (pool index, multi-hop routing, quote-token support, stablecoin pricing overhaul, etc.).
